description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to an archive AppleTV+ game tile
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team>, <away_team>, <away_team_runs> Runs, <home_team>, <home_team_runs> Runs, <away_team>, <away_team_wins> Wins, <away_team_losses> Losses, <home_team>, <home_team_wins> Wins, <home_team_losses> Losses, FINAL, Winning Pitcher <pitcher>, <pitcher_innings_pitched> Innings Pitched, <pitcher_ERA> Earned Run Average, Losing Pitcher <pitcher>, <pitcher_innings_pitched> Innings Pitched, <pitcher_ERA> Earned Run Average. Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to hear more games. Move up to navigate to a new date."
